import.title: Referee course results
import.uploadLabel: Select CSV file with referee course results
import.intro: Upload a CSV file with referee course results. Each import then goes through a review step — the license level is set per row and any deviating master data is corrected.

detail.progress: {{ total }} records • {{ pending }} open • {{ applied }} applied
detail.reviewHint: Choose the license level and, if needed, the correct master data for each record. Only after "Submit" are the records — with the state association control process enabled — submitted for approval.
detail.name: Name:
detail.cancelContent: Really cancel this import? All uploaded rows and pre-entries will be discarded.
detail.missingLevels: The license level is still missing for {{ count }} records.
detail.submittedInfo: Import submitted. Records without correction are applied directly. Records with corrections wait — provided the state association has enabled the control process — for approval by the state association's RSK.

review.title: Referee course results: approval
review.intro: Records with corrected or newly created master data that your state association's control process has submitted for approval. You can adjust the master data directly — the correction is applied to the referee record with "Approve". License level and validity are fixed and are already set immediately.
review.summary: License no.: {{ licenseNumber }} • License level: {{ level }} • valid until {{ validUntil }}

notifications.loadImportsError: The list of imports could not be loaded
notifications.uploadCsvUnprocessable: CSV content could not be processed.
notifications.licenseLevelsLoadError: License levels could not be loaded — submitting is only possible after a reload.
notifications.licenseLevelSaveFailedForRow: License level could not be saved for {{ row }}
notifications.loadPendingError: Open cases could not be loaded
